title: Add system criticality and failure domains
goal: Extend the static Systemkatalog inventory with validated criticality and failure-domain semantics while preserving its status-free authority boundary.

approval.note: User explicitly authorized full registration and implementation on 2026-07-18; live-state, claims, diff review, CI, merge and runtime evidence remain mandatory.

acceptance.assertion: Systems support foundational, essential, supporting and optional criticality with explicit unknown handling.
Systems declare bounded stable failure-domain references without live health or inferred topology.
Initial classifications for critical operator and Weltgewebe systems are reviewed, sourced and schema-valid.
Human and machine-readable catalog projections expose the new semantics deterministically.

does_not_establish: authority outside the listed source systems
